creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed


I committed the update after confirming that it builds, installs, 
and runs on -current as well. 

Please be aware however that this version still suffers from the bug 
mentioned in ports/137635 for me as well. Since this new version is no 
worse than the old (and I imagine there would be a lot more complaints 
if the problem were widespread), I thought it was Ok to go ahead and 
commit the update.
